$comment: Classification of every pcba-solution quote/bom Playwright spec relative to the focused quoteops RELEASE gate (playwright.config.ts `quoteOpsCurrentSpecNames` / --project=quoteops, driven by aura-quote scripts/run-quoteops-bom-gate.sh). Every spec on disk MUST be in one of the two lists below (enforced by check-quoteops-gate-drift.mjs). This exists because a spec listed on the gate's command line but missing from quoteOpsCurrentSpecNames is DROPPED SILENTLY by the project testMatch and the gate goes GREEN without running it (2026-06 incident, OSS#1156 / DDR-2026-06-29 §8). Adding a new pcba-solution quote/bom spec forces a conscious choice here; it never silently escapes the gate.

excludedFromQuoteOpsGate.$comment: Specs that intentionally run under the broader chromium / enterprise-* Playwright projects, NOT the focused quoteops release gate. Keep the reason accurate; if a spec should be part of the release gate, add it to quoteOpsCurrentSpecNames in playwright.config.ts instead of here.
excludedFromQuoteOpsGate.bom-format-review-ui: BOM LLM format-review UI depth (BOM-09/10) — enterprise project coverage, not the release smoke/full role gate.
excludedFromQuoteOpsGate.bom-workbench-lines: BOM workbench candidate confirm/undo/exclude depth (BOM-05/06) — deep workbench coverage under the enterprise project.
excludedFromQuoteOpsGate.quote-actions: Quote actions deep dive (upload/process-fee/gerber/deepseek) — depth suite, superset of the focused quoteops action checks.
excludedFromQuoteOpsGate.quote-bom-badfile-permissions: Bad-file convert + permissions-page edge coverage (BOM-04) — enterprise project.
excludedFromQuoteOpsGate.quote-bom-convert-export: BOM convert + export deep (BOM-03/05/08 + XLS-B) — depth suite beyond the release gate's export smoke.
excludedFromQuoteOpsGate.quote-bom-customer-crud-isolation: Customer delete + data-scope isolation — data-scope suite under the enterprise project.
excludedFromQuoteOpsGate.quote-bom-forms-search-datascope: Forms + search + dropdown + linkage + project data-scope — breadth suite under the enterprise project.
excludedFromQuoteOpsGate.quote-bom-org-admin: Org admin CRUD (ORG-01/03) — org-governance coverage, not the quoteops release gate.
excludedFromQuoteOpsGate.quote-data-scope-isolation: Quote data-scope isolation self/all — data-scope suite under the enterprise project.
excludedFromQuoteOpsGate.quote-doc-excel: Quote pricing + document excel depth (QO-04/07 + XLS-Q) — depth suite; the release gate covers quote-excel-download as its download smoke.
excludedFromQuoteOpsGate.quote-form-dropdowns: Quote form reference dropdowns searchable (DD-04/05) — form-control coverage under the enterprise project.
